test_sufficiency_summary: Tester validation passed (make -C src/tactical; cd tests/tactical && make && ./TacticalTests => OK (65 tests)). Coverage is generally sufficient for the cleanup contract, but no tactical seam assertion currently pins the new selected-ship clearing branch in FBattleScreen::clearDestroyedShips().
documentation_accuracy_summary: doc/DesignNotes.md accurately reflects the implemented Subtask 3 cleanup contract and remains consistent with Milestone 8 additive tactical separation language.

findings.summary: New selected-ship cleanup branch is not covered by tactical seam assertions.
